name: 本地工作区执行器
description: 在 GraphiteUI 工作区内执行受策略约束的文件读写、目录操作和本地命令/脚本运行。内置文件写入默认只能写 backend/data，并会阻止受保护路径；遇到越权路径时返回 blocked 和建议加入的最小白名单。
agentInstruction: 你已绑定本地工作区执行器。只在用户明确需要本地文件读写、生成用户自定义技能、运行脚本或执行本地测试时调用它。优先使用相对路径；如果返回 blocked，把 blocked_path、blocked_operation 和 suggested_policy_update 明确告诉用户，并请求用户确认是否开放新的白名单，不要自行绕过策略。本地子进程不是 OS 级沙箱，执行前必须确认 execute 根目录和脚本来源符合用户意图。

inputSchema.name: Action
inputSchema.description: One of read_file, write_file, list_dir, delete_path, run_command, or run_script.

inputSchema.name: Path
inputSchema.description: Relative file, directory, or script path inside the GraphiteUI workspace.

inputSchema.name: Working Directory
inputSchema.description: Relative working directory for run_command or run_script.

inputSchema.name: Command
inputSchema.description: Command array for run_command, for example ["python", "probe.py"].

outputSchema.name: Changed Paths
outputSchema.description: Relative paths modified by the operation.

outputSchema.name: Read Files
outputSchema.description: Relative files read by the operation.

outputSchema.name: Blocked Path
outputSchema.description: Path blocked by policy, if any.

outputSchema.name: Blocked Operation
outputSchema.description: Operation blocked by policy, if any.

outputSchema.name: Suggested Policy Update
outputSchema.description: Minimal allow-root suggestion for user review.
